items.title: Alibaba reports Q3 revenue up 2% YoY ~$41.3B, below ~$42B est., and net income down 67% YoY to ~$2.4B, as it seeks to monetize its expensive AI push (Luz Ding/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Alibaba reports Q3 revenue up 2% YoY ~$41.3B, below ~$42B est., and net income down 67% YoY to ~$2.4B, as it seeks to monetize its expensive AI push (Luz Ding/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Alibaba reports Q3 revenue up 2% YoY ~$41.3B, below ~$42B est., and net income down 67% YoY to ~$2.4B, as it seeks to monetize its expensive AI push (Luz Ding/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴报告称，第三季度收入同比增长 2% ~$41.3B，低于预期的 ~$42B，净利润同比下降 67% 至 $2.4B，因为该公司寻求将其昂贵的人工智能推广货币化（Luz Ding/彭博社）
